title: polygala amara subsp. alpestris
intro: Polygala amara subsp. alpestris, also known as Alpine Milkwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. It is a perennial herb native to mountainous regions, used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alpine Milkwort include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to support immune function. Alpine Milkwort is often prepared for herbal use in the form of teas, infusions, or dried extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in human applications.
